[[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] '''Kohn Doil''' was the [[Commander-in-Chief/Legends|commander-in-chief]] of the security team who served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] on [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]]. He was sent to the [[Republic Mobile Surgical Unit/Legends|RMSU]]-7 in order to look into the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Filba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. He supported that the Hutt was the [[Spy/Legends|spy]] and his death closed the spy affair.<ref name="Battle Surgeons" />

==Appearances==
*''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[MedStar II: Jedi Healer]]'' {{Mo}}
